videos.title: Confederate Monuments: The Truth Behind the Lost Cause Narrative #shorts
videos.description: Discover how the United Daughters of the Confederacy manipulated textbooks, curriculums, and public monuments to promote the 'Lost Cause' narrative, downplaying slavery's role in the Civil War and shaping generations' understanding. #LostCauseNarrative #CivilWarHistory #HistoricalRevisionism #Confederacy #USHistory

videos.title: Melanin: From Inferiority to Biological Power #shorts
videos.description: Once the universal trait of early humans, dark skin and melanin richness are now wrongly associated with inferiority. This isn't biology; it's a narrative imposed. #Melanin #HumanOrigins #Race #Biology #Sociology

videos.title: Bible Interpretation: Avoid Philosophy and Vain Deceit #shorts
videos.description: Colossians warns against man-made traditions and inserting personal worldviews into scripture. Let God's truth prevail over human opinion, as Romans states. #BiblicalTruth #Theology #ChristianLiving #Scripture

videos.title: Christian Color Interpretation: Purity vs. Sin #shorts
videos.description: Discover how interpretations of color in scripture evolved. White symbolizes purity, black sin, light good, and darkness evil—ideas not from ancient Israelites but later adherents. #ColorSymbolism #BiblicalInterpretation #ReligiousHistory #Christianity

videos.title: We need our own educational institutions ‼️ build with me.
Bible Study | Genesis 1:1–3 | By Semitic Jew
videos.description:
This Bible study examines Genesis 1:1–3 as the foundation for understanding creation, divine order, Scripture, and restoration.

The study begins with 2 Timothy 3:16–17, Matthew 19, and Matthew 22 to establish why all Scripture must be studied carefully and why Christ Himself pointed back to Genesis when addressing doctrine, law, and order.

This study covers:

- Genesis 1:1–3
- All Scripture as inspired by God
- Christ’s appeal to “the beginning”
- The Scriptures and the power of God
and more ... 

This lesson focuses on reading the text according to Scripture, not religious tradition, racial propaganda, or philosophical speculation.

Scripture. Logic. Truth.

Shalom.

#semiticjew #genesis #biblestudy #genesis1 #scripturelogictruth #israelites #creation #oldtestament #inthebginninggod

videos.title: Pride vs. Humility: Repentance and True Manhood #shorts
videos.description: Pride whispers defeat, making change feel like losing. True strength lies in a broken spirit and repentance – alignment with God, not weakness. See correction as mercy, not humiliation. #Pride #Humility #Repentance #Faith #SpiritualGrowth

videos.title: Truth Destroys False Innocence: Embrace Real Repentance #shorts
videos.description: We protect comforting myths about our nation, church, family, and politics. But truth doesn't preserve false innocence—it destroys it, paving the way for real repentance. #TruthRevealed #SelfReflection #Deception #Repentance #SocietalTruths

videos.title: Unlearning Oppression: Reclaiming Identity & Faith #shorts
videos.description: We've been taught to measure acceptability by proximity to those who miseducated us. Adopting their religion, structures, holidays, and political categories as our own, mistaking them for divine truth. #CulturalImposition #IdentityCrisis #HistoricalTrauma #SocialCommentary
